sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Mallorca have shown mixed results in their last 5 matches, with 1 win, 1 draw, and 3 losses, scoring 3 goals and conceding 5. Getafe, on the other hand, are in poor form, losing all of their last 5 matches, failing to score in any of them while conceding 8 goals. This indicates Mallorca have a clear edge in current momentum.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last 2 head-to-head matches, Mallorca have dominated Getafe, winning both encounters (1-0 and 2-1). These matches have generally been low-scoring, with under 2.5 goals in most recent clashes, suggesting a tight game is likely.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Mallorca, positioned 10th with 47 points, have scored 34 goals this season (17th in the league) but boast a solid defense (6th fewest goals conceded). Getafe, in 15th with 39 points, have struggled offensively with just 31 goals and are on a goal drought. Mallorca's defensive strength and Getafe's lack of attacking threat tilt the balance toward the home side.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Tactics
sections.text: Mallorca's Vedat Muriqi (7 goals) and Dani Rodríguez (4 goals, 7 assists) will be crucial in breaking down Getafe's defense. Getafe's Mauro Arambarri (9 goals) is a potential threat, but their overall attacking impotency and missing key players like Djené could hinder them. Mallorca are likely to control possession and exploit set-pieces, given their high ranking in accurate crosses.
